guide.subtitleRequiredDone: Main steps done — optional one remaining.

session_types.label: Step 1
session_types.title: Create session types
session_types.hint: Define your services with duration and price.

patients.label: Step 2
patients.title: Add your first patient
patients.hint: Register a patient to start scheduling.

appointments.label: Step 3
appointments.title: Schedule your first session
appointments.hint: Book an appointment on the calendar.

forms.label: Step 4
forms.title: Create an intake form
forms.hint: Send a screening form to your patients.

booking.label: Step 5
booking.title: Set your working hours
booking.hint: Configure your weekly availability for online booking.

team.label: Step 6
team.title: Invite a practitioner
team.hint: Add a teammate to the clinic.

integrativa.label: Integrative / Functional
integrativa.examples: Functional medicine · Acupuncture · Integrative medicine · Longevity

fisioterapia.label: Physical Therapy / Rehabilitation
fisioterapia.examples: Physical therapy · Chiropractic · Osteopathy · Massage therapy

saude_mental.label: Mental Health
saude_mental.examples: Psychology · Therapy · Burnout · Stress · Therapeutic coaching

nutricao.label: Nutrition
nutricao.examples: Clinical nutrition · Sports nutrition · Eating behavior

wellness.label: Wellness / Well-being
wellness.examples: Wellness center · Advanced aesthetics · Clinical spa · Biohacking

stepProfile.title: What is your clinic's profile?
stepProfile.subtitle: AXIEL will set up session types, forms, and terminology automatically for you.

stepName.title: What is your clinic called?
stepName.subtitle: This is the name your team will see inside AXIEL.

stepHours.title: What are your business hours?
stepHours.subtitle: You can fine-tune this later in Settings.

stepTeam.title: Invite a teammate
stepTeam.subtitle: Skip this step if you prefer to add your team later.
stepTeam.selfInviteWarning: This is your own email. The invitation should go to a different colleague. You are already the clinic owner.

flow.terms: I have read and accept the AXIEL Core <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>, including the processing of health data under the LGPD (Law 13.709/2018).
flow.fillNameToContinue: Enter the clinic name to continue
